data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'walk-away tolerance (bathroom, shopping) with position hold', but the evidence does not confirm that this functionality is implemented or tested. While the linked use case describes a scenario where a customer can step away and have their position held for a certain time, there is no concrete evidence or API responses that demonstrate this behavior. Specifically, the evidence lacks details on how the system manages the hold duration and the conditions under which a customer can return to their position, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of implementation for walk-away tolerance with position hold.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the walk-away tolerance functionality.
